messages.content: Write a python function called usd_to_eur that converts USD to EUR using a rate of 0.92. Then use the write_file tool to save it to /tmp/converter.py. After that, use execute_command to run 'python3 /tmp/converter.py' to verify it works.

tools.name: write_file
tools.description: Write content to a file on disk

tools.name: execute_command
tools.description: Execute a shell command and return output
